data.title: California Governor Criticizes U.S. Tariff Policies
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, California Governor Gavin Newsom recently criticized the U.S. federal government's tariff policies in a video posted on social media. He argued that the current tariff measures could jeopardize the United States' status as the world's largest economy. Newsom highlighted that these policies are hindering imports, which directly affects the daily lives of ordinary citizens. He warned that in a few months, there could be shortages of school backpacks and Christmas toys, exacerbating the financial burden on American families.

Newsom emphasized California's significant role in the global economy as the most economically powerful state in the U.S. He attributed this to California's commitment to reducing trade barriers and providing quality services to American consumers. However, he expressed concern that the current tariff policies are undermining these efforts, leading to rising prices and port congestion.

data.title: India says ceasefire reached directly by India and Pakistan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest news from AFP on the 10th, Indian government sources said that the ceasefire between India and Pakistan was reached "through direct negotiations between the two countries." Earlier, US President Trump said that the agreement was reached through negotiations mediated by Washington. The source told AFP: "The cessation of exchanges of fire and military operations between India and Pakistan was reached through direct negotiations between the two countries." (Jin Shi)

data.title: 1confirmation founder: ETH will drive encryption towards one billion users and eventually surpass BTC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News 1confirmation founder Nick Tomaino published an article explaining why ETH surpassed BTC. He pointed out that although BTC has achieved a market value of 2 trillion US dollars with the concept of "trustless value storage", it has now evolved into an asset favored by institutions and governments, with high concentration and lack of practical application support. One entity holds more than 2.5% of BTC, and its ecosystem lacks practical applications that can introduce new users.
In contrast, ETH is a credible and neutral Internet native value storage. As the underlying asset of the developer platform, it supports key tracks such as stablecoins, DeFi, NFT, prediction markets, decentralized social and identity. Almost all new use cases that have driven the development of the industry in the past decade were born in Ethereum and are continuing to grow. These applications not only expand the scale of crypto users, but also continuously enhance their scarcity through ETH as a settlement and collateral asset.
Nick said that it is wrong for extremists to advocate that there is only one credible and neutral value storage. Although there may be more options in the future, there are only two truly viable options at present: BTC and ETH.

data.title: XRP Price To Rally To $6: Partially Completed Wave 5 Says There’s Still Room To Run
data.description:
Bulls appear to be regaining control over the market again as the XRP price gears up for a potential rally to $6. According to a crypto analyst, this forecast is rooted in the Elliott Wave Theory, which indicates that Wave 5, which is the final and usually the most explosive leg up, is getting ready to run. Elliott Wave 5 Signals XRP Price Explosion In one of his latest Elliott Wave analyses, X (formerly Twitter) crypto expert Dark Defender forecasts a powerful rally for the XRP price, suggesting that the third-largest cryptocurrency could skyrocket to $6 soon. According to the analysis, XRP has been moving in a predictable wave structure since February 2025, and recent price action confirms the partial completion of the monthly Wave 5 bull pattern
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-to-rally-to-6/

data.title: Scaramucci Discusses Potential Bitcoin Surge with Regulatory Clarity
data.description: According to PANews, Anthony Scaramucci, founder of SkyBridge Capital, shared insights in a recent podcast interview about the future of Bitcoin investments by sovereign wealth funds. He noted that while some funds have marginally allocated Bitcoin, significant capital inflows are unlikely until the United States establishes clear digital asset regulations. Scaramucci emphasized that the passage of a stablecoin regulatory bill, allowing traditional banks to custody Bitcoin, and advancements in the tokenization of stocks and bonds could trigger substantial Bitcoin purchases by sovereign wealth funds. He further highlighted that Bitcoin's price could reach a million dollars only if these funds view it as an integral part of the global financial infrastructure.

data.title: 4chan rises from the dead: How the imageboard moves crypto markets
data.description:
After 4chan was hacked on April 14 and vast troves of user and moderator data were leaked online, the controversial website quickly went down, and many believed it would never recover. However, less than two weeks later, the imageboard was back online, defiant as ever. “4chan is back,” an official blog post proclaimed. “No other website can replace it, or this community
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/4chan-rises-from-the-dead-how-the-imageboard-moves-crypto-markets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
